title: Figure 8 from: Samarakoon MC, Manawasinghe IS (2026) Additions to the Xylariomycetidae (Sordariomycetes) fungal flora from northern Thailand: four novel Amphisphaeria species. MycoKeys 132: 63-90. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.132.188390
author: Samarakoon, Milan C.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 8 Amphisphaeria pterocarpi (MFLU 26-0125). a. Substrate; b. Ascomata in dead substrate (ascomata shown with white arrows); c, d. Vertical sections through ascomata; e. Vertical section through ostiolar canal; f. Peridium; g, h. Paraphyses; i–m. Asci; n. Apical ring bluing in Melzer's reagent; o–w. Ascospores (o in Indian ink). Scale bars: 100 μm (c, d); 50 μm (e); 20 μm (f, i–m); 10 μm (g, h, n–w).
